```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement security awareness and secure coding guidelines"
---
# Secure Coding Guidelines
## Task
Document and enforce secure coding guidelines.
## Requirements
1. Document top 10 secure coding practices. 2. Create code examples for common patterns.
3. Integrate checks into code review process. 4. Provide secure coding training materials.
5. Update guidelines with new vulnerability patterns.
## Constraints
- Guidelines must be practical and actionable. Include code examples. Review quarterly.
## Success Criteria
- Guidelines documented. Examples provided. Integrated into review. Updated regularly.
```
